name: Weighted Split Calculator — agent-lab port
description: Original agent-lab coding maintenance task ported into the GoblinBench coding-agent harness.

input.task:
# Weighted Split Ticket

The payouts service still has incorrect remainder distribution when splitting a total amount across weighted recipients.

Please fix the splitter so that:

- the total stays exact
- extra cents are distributed deterministically
- the output is stable for repeated runs

You can update tests if needed, but keep the public surface area small.

Target file:

- `EvalLab.Core/Cases/WeightedSplit/WeightedSplitCalculator.cs`
